ready.title: Ready
ready.summary: Package is ready for automatic or manual start.

manual.title: Manual
manual.summary: Manual lane is active for commissioning.

allow_start_running.title: Allow Start Running
allow_start_running.summary: Run start is allowed only when package permissives are clear and no interlock is active.

suction_blocked.title: Suction Blocked
suction_blocked.summary: Suction path inhibit remains clear on the ready baseline.

ready_path.title: Ready Path
ready_path.summary: Protection baseline is clear and package is ready.

request_recovery.title: Request Recovery
request_recovery.summary: Recovery request is available on the ready baseline.

manual_owner.title: Manual Owner
manual_owner.summary: Manual ownership lane is available but not active.

service_owner.title: Service Owner
service_owner.summary: Service ownership lane is available for maintenance use.

remote_owner.title: Remote Owner
remote_owner.summary: Remote ownership lane is available but denied for reset.

stop_service.title: Stop In Service
stop_service.summary: Service stop is blocked until the maintenance window opens.

reset_remote.title: Reset From Remote
reset_remote.summary: Remote reset is denied because automatic ownership has authority.

stop_manual.title: Stop In Manual
stop_manual.summary: Manual stop is superseded by the accepted auto start request.

command_summary.title: Command Summary
command_summary.summary: Automatic ownership remains active while blocked, denied, and superseded command outcomes stay explicit.

manual_owner.title: Manual Holder
manual_owner.summary: Manual holder can request local handover.

service_owner.title: Service Holder
service_owner.summary: Service holder is available for maintenance takeover.

remote_owner.title: Remote Holder
remote_owner.summary: Remote holder is visible but not currently requested.

handover_summary.title: Override Summary
handover_summary.summary: Automatic authority is active while a manual takeover remains available.

manual_takeover.title: Manual Takeover
manual_takeover.summary: Local manual handover is available from the panel lane.

service_takeover.title: Service Takeover
service_takeover.summary: Service takeover is blocked until the maintenance window is open.

return_to_auto.title: Return To Auto
return_to_auto.summary: Return-to-auto stays available as the package-neutral fallback.

remote_release.title: Remote Release
remote_release.summary: Remote release is denied because the automatic holder remains authoritative.
